title: With AI, investor loyalty is (almost) dead: At least a dozen OpenAI VCs now also back Anthropic
description: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.
content: While some dual investors are understandable, others were more shocking, and signal the disregard of a longstanding ethical conflict-of-interest rule.
